---
title: "Slide"
format: html
---

# Our efforts at University of Maryland, Baltimore

- Over past 3 years, working to develop software tools for both individual researchers, and shared-resource laboratory staff, to characterize, flag and correct these types of issues before we unmix.

- Work has been primarily been done in R programming language, building off existing Bioconductor infrastructure support. 

- Focus has been on 

1) Stability of our single-colors

2) Isolating multiple autofluorescences

3) Enhancing Instrument QC assessment.
